    L

    LAMP - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    Leaderboard - Class in model
     
    Leaderboard() - Constructor for class model.Leaderboard
    Leaderboard constructor creates the leaderboard list
    Level - Class in model.level
    Level is a place that is loaded by a txt file (getting the lvData and giving to the EntityManager) where Player can traverse and Entity can stay (managed by EntityManager).
    Level(String) - Constructor for class model.level.Level
    Level constructor that other than getting the data it also initialize the EntityManager getting the same file name in entity data folder
    LevelManager - Class in model.level
    Main manager of the levels that saves them, create the map (with the distribution of the items) and handles the transition and commands of the Player.
    LevelManager(Play) - Constructor for class model.level.LevelManager
    Loads the levels and initialize them together with the puzzles distribution and the map
    LIBRARY - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    Lift - Class in model.entity.detectable.entities
    Entity that represents a Lift platform for the Player to stand on and control.
    Lift(float, float, int) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Lift contructor that set the position and the current floor is in
    LIFT - Enum constant in enum class model.util.EntityFactory.EntityTypes
     
    liftCheckH(float, float, float, Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Horizontal Lift check
    liftCheckH(float, float, int) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Horizontal lift check
    liftCheckV(float, float, int) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Vertical lift check
    liftCheckV(float, float, int, Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Vertical Lift check
    LiftManager - Class in model.entity.detectable
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.
    LiftManager(List, Map) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    LiftManager constructor that collects the lifts and their floors
    load(String) - Static method in class model.util.DataManager
    Static class to load the file
    loadGroupImage(String, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class view.util.LoadImage
    Gives a matrix of images used for the animation
    LoadImage - Class in view.util
    Class used to load single or group of images.
    LoadImage() - Constructor for class view.util.LoadImage
     
    LOST - Enum constant in enum class model.Play.PlayState
     
    LV_HEIGHT - Static variable in class model.level.Level
     
    LV_REAL_HEIGHT - Static variable in class model.level.Level
     
    LV_REAL_WIDTH - Static variable in class model.level.Level
     
    LV_WIDTH - Static variable in class model.level.Level
